info.name: Backblaze B2 Native API
info.description:
The Backblaze B2 Native API provides programmatic access to Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage. It covers account authorization, bucket management, file upload and download, lifecycle rules, application key management, large file handling, replication, and event notifications. The API uses HTTPS with JSON request and response bodies. Authentication is performed via the b2_authorize_account endpoint which returns an authorization token used for subsequent calls.

Contact Support:
 Name: Backblaze Developer Support

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Authorize Account

request.description: Used to log in to the B2 API. Returns an authorization token that can be used for account-level operations. The authorization token is valid for at most 24 hours. This endpoint uses HTTP Basic authentication with the application key ID as the username and the application key as the password.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Create Bucket

request.description: Creates a new bucket. A bucket must be globally unique across all of Backblaze B2 or the request will fail.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Delete Bucket

request.description: Deletes the bucket specified. Only buckets that contain no version of any files can be deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API List Buckets

request.description: Lists buckets associated with an account, in alphabetical order by bucket name.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Update Bucket

request.description: Update an existing bucket. Can be used to change the bucket type, bucket info, CORS rules, and lifecycle rules.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Get Upload URL

request.description: Gets a URL for uploading a single file to a bucket. The URL returned is specific to the bucket and can only be used to upload to that bucket.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Upload File

header.description: (Required) URL-encoded name of the file
(Required) Length of the file in bytes
(Required) SHA1 checksum of the file content

request.description: Uploads one file to B2, returning its unique file ID. The file data is the request body. Before calling this function, b2_get_upload_url must be called to get the URL and authorization token.

header.description: (Required) URL-encoded name of the file
(Required) Length of the file in bytes
(Required) SHA1 checksum of the file content
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) URL-encoded name of the file
(Required) Length of the file in bytes
(Required) SHA1 checksum of the file content
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Download File by ID

query.description: (Required) The unique file ID to download

request.description: Downloads one file by its file ID. Can be used to download a specific version of a file.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: (Required) The unique file ID to download

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Download File by Name

variable.description: (Required) Name of the bucket containing the file
(Required) Full name of the file including any prefix

request.description: Downloads one file from a public or private bucket by name.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Get File Info

request.description: Gets information about one file stored in B2.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Delete File Version

request.description: Deletes one version of a file from B2. If the version you delete is the latest version, and there are older versions, then the most recent older version will become the current version of the file.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API List File Names

request.description: Lists the names of all files in a bucket, starting at a given name. Returns at most 1000 file names, but it can be set to return fewer.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API List File Versions

request.description: Lists all of the versions of all of the files contained in one bucket, in alphabetical order by file name, and by reverse of date/time uploaded for versions of files with the same name.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Copy File

request.description: Creates a new file by copying from an existing file. It copies the source file's contents and optionally overrides some of the source file's metadata.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Hide File

request.description: Hides a file so that downloading by name will not find the file, but previous versions of the file are still stored. Can be used to effectively delete a file if versioning is enabled.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Get Download Authorization

request.description: Used to generate an authorization token that can be used to download files with the specified prefix from a private bucket.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Start Large File

request.description: Prepares for uploading the parts of a large file. Files over 100MB must be uploaded in parts. Returns a fileId that is used when uploading parts of this file, finishing this file, and canceling this file.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Get Upload Part URL

request.description: Gets an URL to use for uploading parts of a large file.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Finish Large File

request.description: Converts the parts that have been uploaded into a single B2 file.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Cancel Large File

request.description: Cancels a large file upload and deletes all of the parts that have been uploaded.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API List Parts

request.description: Lists the parts that have been uploaded for a large file, in order of part number.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API List Unfinished Large Files

request.description: Lists information about large file uploads that have been started but not finished or cancelled.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Create Key

request.description: Creates a new application key. The key returned by this API can only be used to access the account that created it.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API Delete Key

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Backblaze B2 Native API List Keys

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
